site.title: Sebastian Rösch
site.description: B.Sc. Business Informatics · Curious Builder. Portfolio of Sebastian Rösch.
hero.intro: I learn best by building things: machine learning, web, DevOps, mostly in my own projects.
about.title: About me
about.body: I hold a B.Sc. in business informatics. At Fraunhofer ISE I built load-forecasting models for buildings, and before that I automated SAP test processes with Tricentis TOSCA at Haufe Group.
about.body2: Beyond that, what drives me is curiosity. I teach myself new things by building my own projects in my spare time: a reinforcement-learning agent for Super Mario, a small Kubernetes lab, a web shop. Not because it solves some big problem, but because I want to understand how it works.
projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: A selection of my work — from platform engineering to machine learning.
